TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: uzai a tsautsau ka sitsuayan a puanemanema.
S.PHON: uzai a ʦauʦau ka siʦuajan a puanəmanəma.
S.FORM: uzai a caucau ka sicuayan a puanemanema.
S.PHON: uzai a ʦauʦau ka siʦuajan a puanəmanəma.
S.TRANSL: Once upon a time there was a rich person.

S.FORM: manu kamayan a mangtjez a tsaḍ; ini papaulingavi timadju.
S.PHON: manu kamajan a maŋcəz a ʦaɖ; ini papauɭiŋavi timaɉu.
S.FORM: manu kamayan a mangtjez a cadr; ini papaulingavi timadju.
S.PHON: manu kamajan a maŋʦəz a ʦaɖ; ini papauɣiŋavi timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: Thieves kept coming and (s)he didn’t feel secure.

S.FORM: qau kinemnem timadju tu "kudain tsu a tsaḍ sa karekutj?" aya timadju a kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau kinəmnəm timaɉu tu "kudain ʦu a ʦaɖ sa karəkuc" aja timaɉu a kinəmnəm.
S.FORM: qau kinemnem timadju tu "kudain cu a cadr sa karekutj?" aya timadju a kinemnem.
S.PHON: qau kinəmnəm timaɉu tu "kudain ʦu a ʦaɖ sa kaRəkuʦ" aja timaɉu a kinəmnəm.
S.TRANSL: So he thought: “What can be done to these thieves to frighten them?” he thought.

S.FORM: ɫakua ini keɫang timadju tu kudain.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini kəʎaŋ timaɉu tu kudain.
S.FORM: ljakua ini keljang timadju tu kudain.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini kəʎaŋ timaɉu tu kudain.
S.TRANSL: But he didn’t know what to do.

S.FORM: manu mangtjez a vuluvulung a tsautsau.
S.PHON: manu maŋcəz a vuɭuvuɭuŋ a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: manu mangtjez a vuluvulung a caucau.
S.PHON: manu maŋʦəz a vuɣuvuɣuŋ a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: Now an old person came,

S.FORM: kivadaqan timadju: "anema su kinemnemnemen?" ayain a kivadaq timadju.
S.PHON: kivadaqan timaɉu: "anəma su kinəmnəmnəmən" ajain a kivadaq timaɉu.
S.FORM: kivadaqan timadju: "anema su kinemnemnemen?" ayain a kivadaq timadju.
S.PHON: kivadaqan timaɉu: "anəma su kinəmnəmnəmən" ajain a kivadaq timaɉu.
S.TRANSL: and asked him: “What are you thinking about?” he was asked.

S.FORM: qau tjemumaɫ tua varung nimadju: "avan tsu a tsaḍ a tjuruvu aravats.
S.PHON: qau cəmumaʎ tua varuŋ nimaɉu: "avan ʦu a ʦaɖ a curuvu aravaʦ.
S.FORM: qau tjemumalj tua varung nimadju: "avan cu a cadr a tjuruvu aravac.
S.PHON: qau ʦəmumaʎ tua vaRuŋ nimaɉu: "avan ʦu a ʦaɖ a ʦuRuvu aRavaʦ.
S.TRANSL: So he told him what was on his mind: “It’s this large number of thieves.

S.FORM: ku kudain sa kasualap?, aya ku varung.
S.PHON: ku kudain sa kasuaɭapʔ, aja ku varuŋ.
S.FORM: ku kudain sa kasualap', aya ku varung.
S.PHON: ku kudain sa kasuaɣapʔ, aja ku vaRuŋ.
S.TRANSL: What am I to do to get rid of them is what I am thinking.

S.FORM: ɫakua ini ku keɫang.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini ku kəʎaŋ.
S.FORM: ljakua ini ku keljang.
S.PHON: ʎakua ini ku kəʎaŋ.
S.TRANSL: But I don’t know what to do.

S.FORM: nu kemɫang sun, tjumaɫi aken," aya azua puanemanema a tsautsau.
S.PHON: nu kəmʎaŋ sun, cumaʎi akən," aja azua puanəmanəma a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: nu kemljang sun, tjumalji aken," aya azua puanemanema a caucau.
S.PHON: nu kəmʎaŋ sun, ʦumaʎi akən," aja azua puanəmanəma a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: If you know, tell me,” said the rich person.

S.FORM: "manu avan azua su kinemnemnemen.
S.PHON: "manu avan azua su kinəmnəmnəmən.
S.FORM: "manu avan azua su kinemnemnemen.
S.PHON: "manu avan azua su kinəmnəmnəmən.
S.TRANSL: “So that’s what you are thinking about.

S.FORM: ɫakua maya mapuvarung.
S.PHON: ʎakua maja mapuvaruŋ.
S.FORM: ljakua maya mapuvarung.
S.PHON: ʎakua maja mapuvaRuŋ.
S.TRANSL: But don’t worry.

S.FORM: kemɫang aken aravats," ayain.
S.PHON: kəmʎaŋ akən aravaʦ," ajain.
S.FORM: kemljang aken aravac," ayain.
S.PHON: kəmʎaŋ akən aRavaʦ," ajain.
S.TRANSL: I know very well what to do,” he was told.

S.FORM: qau maleva azua puanemanema a tsautsau.
S.PHON: qau maɭəva azua puanəmanəma a ʦauʦau.
S.FORM: qau maleva azua puanemanema a caucau.
S.PHON: qau maɣəva azua puanəmanəma a ʦauʦau.
S.TRANSL: So the rich person was glad.

S.FORM: "nu maitazua sa kemɫang sun, tjumaɫi aken."
S.PHON: "nu maitazua sa kəmʎaŋ sun, cumaʎi akən."
S.FORM: "nu maitazua sa kemljang sun, tjumalji aken."
S.PHON: "nu maitazua sa kəmʎaŋ sun, ʦumaʎi akən."
S.TRANSL: “If you really know, tell me.”

S.FORM: "ui, ku tjumaɫay sun.
S.PHON: "ui, ku cumaʎaj sun.
S.FORM: "ui, ku tjumaljay sun.
S.PHON: "ui, ku ʦumaʎaj sun.
S.TRANSL: “Yes, I’ll tell you.

S.FORM: uzai a vatu a ku ɫinengɫengan i Guruɫan a liaw aravats, maya kinababulay anga.
S.PHON: uzai a vatu a ku ʎinəŋʎəŋan i guruʎan a ɭiaw aravaʦ, maja kinababuɭaj aŋa.
S.FORM: uzai a vatu a ku ljinengljengan i Guruljan a liaw aravac, maya kinababulay anga.
S.PHON: uzai a vatu a ku ʎinəŋʎəŋan i guRuʎan a ɣiaw aRavaʦ, maja kinababuɣaj aŋa.
S.TRANSL: I have seen plenty of dogs on Guruɫan mountain, and fine ones too.

S.FORM: ɫakua nu muri vaik itjen a kivatu a sema zua, katsen itjen nua vatu.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu muri vaik icən a kivatu a səma zua, kaʦən icən nua vatu.
S.FORM: ljakua nu muri vaik itjen a kivatu a sema zua, kacen itjen nua vatu.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu muRi vaik iʦən a kivatu a səma zua, kaʦən iʦən nua vatu.
S.TRANSL: But if we go there to get dogs, we’ll be bitten by the dogs.

S.FORM: ɫakua nu tja saneqavayi tua vaqu, sa tja pataudi tua quvaɫ a qavay, sa tja pakani a kina nua vatu; qau sedjeketsan a angaɫ nua qavay; qau mapusemualap a kina nua vatu.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu ca sanəqavaji tua vaqu, sa ca pataudi tua quvaʎ a qavaj, sa ca pakani a kina nua vatu; qau səɉəkəʦan a aŋaʎ nua qavaj; qau mapusəmuaɭap a kina nua vatu.
S.FORM: ljakua nu tja saneqavayi tua vaqu, sa tja pataudi tua quvalj a qavay, sa tja pakani a kina nua vatu; qau sedjekecan a angalj nua qavay; qau mapusemualap a kina nua vatu.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu ʦa sanəqavaji tua vaqu, sa ʦa pataudi tua quvaʎ a qavaj, sa ʦa pakani a kina nua vatu; qau səɉəkəʦan a aŋaʎ nua qavaj; qau mapusəmuaɣap a kina nua vatu.
S.TRANSL: But if we make dumplings of millet and mix hair in the dumplings, and feed them to the mother dog, then her mouth will get stuck up with the dumpling, and the mother dog will do nothing but try to get rid of it.

S.FORM: qau nuka tja sazuain anga, ini anga keɫang a vatu tu tja alalapen a aɫak.
S.PHON: qau nuka ca sazuain aŋa, ini aŋa kəʎaŋ a vatu tu ca aɭaɭapən a aʎak.
S.FORM: qau nuka tja sazuain anga, ini anga keljang a vatu tu tja alalapen a aljak.
S.PHON: qau nuka ʦa sazuain aŋa, ini aŋa kəʎaŋ a vatu tu ʦa aɣaɣapən a aʎak.
S.TRANSL: Then even if we go there, the dog won’t know that we are taking away her puppies.

S.FORM: tja alapen a aɫak; qau tja katsuin a tjumaq azua kuku, sa tja pakani.
S.PHON: ca aɭapən a aʎak; qau ca kaʦuin a cumaq azua kuku, sa ca pakani.
S.FORM: tja alapen a aljak; qau tja kacuin a tjumaq azua kuku, sa tja pakani.
S.PHON: ʦa aɣapən a aʎak; qau ʦa kaʦuin a ʦumaq azua kuku, sa ʦa pakani.
S.TRANSL: We’ll take the puppies, and bring them home, and feed them.

S.FORM: qau nu meqatsa azua kuku, gemurugur a kemats anga, nu mangtjez a tsaḍ nu qezemezemetj.
S.PHON: qau nu məqaʦa azua kuku, gəmurugur a kəmaʦ aŋa, nu maŋcəz a ʦaɖ nu qəzəməzəməc.
S.FORM: qau nu meqaca azua kuku, gemurugur a kemac anga, nu mangtjez a cadr nu qezemezemetj.
S.PHON: qau nu məqaʦa azua kuku, gəmuRuguR a kəmaʦ aŋa, nu maŋʦəz a ʦaɖ nu qəzəməzəməʦ.
S.TRANSL: When the puppies get big, they’ll bark and bite, if a thief comes at night.

S.FORM: qau nu katsen nu guruguren a tsaḍ, ini anga turu a mangtjez a
S.PHON: qau nu kaʦən nu gurugurən a ʦaɖ, ini aŋa turu a maŋcəz a
S.FORM: qau nu kacen nu guruguren a cadr, ini anga turu a mangtjez a
S.PHON: qau nu kaʦən nu guRuguRən a ʦaɖ, ini aŋa tuRu a maŋʦəz a
S.TRANSL: tsemakaw.”
